requirement_topic.en: 60 Hz Grid Frequency and 127 / 220 V Voltage Incompatibility — Critical Hardware Barrier for Chinese 50 Hz Heat Pumps
requirement_topic.zh: 60 Hz电网频率与127 / 220 V电压不兼容——中国50 Hz热泵的关键硬件壁垒
requirement_topic.zht: 60 Hz電網頻率與127 / 220 V電壓不相容——中國50 Hz熱泵的關鍵硬體壁垒

summary.en: Colombia's electrical grid operates at 60 Hz (not 50 Hz) and at residential voltages of 120 / 127 V single-phase and 220 V split-phase, with industrial three-phase at 220 / 440 V. This is fundamentally incompatible with standard Chinese heat pump products, which are designed for 50 Hz, 220 V (single-phase residential) or 380 V (three-phase industrial). Compressor motors, fan motors, control boards, and transformer stages in 50 Hz Chinese heat pumps are optimised for 50 Hz and will overheat, underperform, or fail prematurely on the Colombian 60 Hz grid. NTC standards adopted by ICONTEC (harmonised from IEC) specify performance and safety testing at 60 Hz for products sold in Colombia. Colombian RETIE and NTC conformity require that products be rated and tested at Colombian nominal voltage and frequency before certification and sale.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚电网运行频率为60 Hz（非50 Hz），居民用电压为单相120 / 127 V和分相220 V，工业三相为220 / 440 V。这与标准中国热泵产品根本不兼容——中国产品针对50 Hz、220 V（单相住宅）或380 V（三相工业）设计。中国50 Hz热泵中的压缩机电机、风扇电机、控制板和变压器级均针对50 Hz优化，在哥伦比亚60 Hz电网下将出现过热、性能下降或提前损坏。ICONTEC采纳的NTC标准（源自IEC协调）规定在哥伦比亚销售的产品须在60 Hz下进行性能和安全测试。哥伦比亚RETIE和NTC合规要求产品在认证和销售前须按哥伦比亚标称电压和频率额定并测试。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞電網運行頻率為60 Hz（非50 Hz），居民用電壓為單相120 / 127 V和分相220 V，工業三相為220 / 440 V。這與標準中國熱泵產品根本不相容——中國產品針對50 Hz、220 V（單相住宅）或380 V（三相工業）設計。中國50 Hz熱泵中的壓縮機電機、風扇電機、控制板和變壓器級均針對50 Hz最佳化，在哥倫比亞60 Hz電網下將出現過熱、性能下降或提前損壞。ICONTEC採納的NTC標準（源自IEC協調）規定在哥倫比亞銷售的產品須在60 Hz下進行性能和安全測試。哥倫比亞RETIE和NTC合規要求產品在認證和銷售前須按哥倫比亞標稱電壓和頻率額定並測試。

standards_or_laws: NTC-IEC 60335-2-40 (Safety and performance of heat pumps and air conditioners — 60 Hz test basis in Colombia)
RETIE — Reglamento Técnico de Instalaciones Eléctricas (nominal voltage/frequency conformity requirement)
CREG (Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas) — Colombian grid frequency and voltage standards
ICONTEC NTC harmonisation of IEC standards at 60 Hz nominal conditions

summary.en: Chinese heat pumps and air conditioners are designed and tested at 50 Hz, 220 V (single-phase) or 380 V (three-phase) under GB/T 7725, GB 25454, and GB 4706.32. CCC testing is conducted at 50 Hz, 220 V. Chinese product nameplates, CCC marks, and energy efficiency ratings are all based on 50 Hz operation. These specifications and certifications are entirely inapplicable to the Colombian 60 Hz, 127-220 V grid and cannot be used to demonstrate conformity under RETIE, NTC, or RETIQ.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和空调器依据GB/T 7725、GB 25454和GB 4706.32设计并在50 Hz、220 V（单相）或380 V（三相）下测试。CCC测试在50 Hz、220 V下进行。中国产品铭牌、CCC标志和能效等级均基于50 Hz运行。这些规格和认证完全不适用于哥伦比亚60 Hz、127-220 V电网，不能用于证明符合RETIE、NTC或RETIQ要求。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和空調器依據GB/T 7725、GB 25454和GB 4706.32設計並在50 Hz、220 V（單相）或380 V（三相）下測試。CCC測試在50 Hz、220 V下進行。中國產品銘牌、CCC標誌和能效等級均基於50 Hz運行。這些規格和認證完全不適用於哥倫比亞60 Hz、127-220 V電網，不能用於證明符合RETIE、NTC或RETIQ要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners — performance testing at 50 Hz, 220 V)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters — energy efficiency at 50 Hz)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (50 Hz, 220 V test basis)
GB 9237 (Refrigerating systems and heat pumps — 50 Hz baseline)

gap.en: Critical hardware gap — not merely a documentation or re-testing issue. Standard Chinese heat pump compressors, fan motors, and control electronics are optimised for 50 Hz and are NOT compatible with the Colombian 60 Hz grid. Exporting a standard Chinese 50 Hz heat pump to Colombia without redesign will result in compressor failure, reduced efficiency, voided warranty, and potential safety hazards. A purpose-designed 60 Hz variant with a compressor, motor windings, and control board rated for 60 Hz is required. Additionally, some Colombian residential circuits operate at 127 V single-phase (not 220 V), requiring voltage adaptation or a purpose-designed dual-voltage unit. All RETIE and NTC conformity testing must be conducted at 60 Hz and applicable Colombian voltages; Chinese CCC evidence at 50 Hz is irrelevant.
gap.zh: 存在关键硬件差距——这不仅仅是文件或重新测试问题。标准中国热泵压缩机、风扇电机和控制电子元器件针对50 Hz优化，与哥伦比亚60 Hz电网不兼容。在未经重新设计的情况下将标准中国50 Hz热泵出口至哥伦比亚，将导致压缩机损坏、能效下降、保修失效和潜在安全隐患。须提供专为60 Hz设计的变型产品，配备额定60 Hz的压缩机、电机绕组和控制板。此外，哥伦比亚部分住宅线路运行在127 V单相（非220 V），须进行电压适配或采用专为双电压设计的设备。所有RETIE和NTC符合性测试须在60 Hz及适用哥伦比亚电压下进行；中国50 Hz下的CCC证据不具参考价值。
gap.zht: 存在關鍵硬體差距——這不僅僅是文件或重新測試問題。標準中國熱泵壓縮機、風扇電機和控制電子元器件針對50 Hz最佳化，與哥倫比亞60 Hz電網不相容。在未經重新設計的情況下將標準中國50 Hz熱泵出口至哥倫比亞，將導致壓縮機損壞、能效下降、保固失效和潛在安全隱患。須提供專為60 Hz設計的變型產品，配備額定60 Hz的壓縮機、電機繞組和控制板。此外，哥倫比亞部分住宅線路運行在127 V單相（非220 V），須進行電壓適配或採用專為雙電壓設計的設備。所有RETIE和NTC符合性測試須在60 Hz及適用哥倫比亞電壓下進行；中國50 Hz下的CCC證據不具參考價值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Colombian grid is 60 Hz; all electrical products including heat pumps must be rated, tested, and certified at 60 Hz under RETIE and applicable NTC; 127 V / 220 V voltage compatibility required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese market at 50 Hz, 220 V / 380 V under GB standards and CCC; entirely different frequency and voltage basis — not applicable to Colombia

source.publisher: CREG — Comisión de Regulación de Energía y Gas, República de Colombia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Critical gap — Colombian 60 Hz grid is fundamentally incompatible with Chinese 50 Hz heat pumps; compressor and motor redesign is required before export, not just re-testing; 127 V residential voltage in some areas adds further hardware complexity; CCC evidence is entirely inapplicable.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在关键差距——哥伦比亚60 Hz电网与中国50 Hz热泵根本不兼容；出口前须重新设计压缩机和电机，而非仅重新测试；部分地区127 V住宅电压带来额外硬件复杂性；CCC证据完全不适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在關鍵差距——哥倫比亞60 Hz電網與中國50 Hz熱泵根本不相容；出口前須重新設計壓縮機和電機，而非僅重新測試；部分地區127 V住宅電壓帶來額外硬體複雜性；CCC證據完全不適用。
